name: Fastly, Inc.

profile.description: Fastly is an edge cloud platform company that provides content delivery (CDN), security (WAF, DDoS protection, bot mitigation), and edge computing services to enterprise customers including media, e-commerce, and technology companies. CEO Kip Compton is leading a three-year transformation that delivered record Q4 2025 revenue of $172.6M (+23% YoY) and a 60% stock surge after Q4 earnings, positioning Fastly as critical infrastructure for the 'Agentic AI' internet economy.

innovation.label: STRONG
innovation.analysis: Fastly delivered record Q4 2025 revenue of $172.6M (+23% YoY) with security revenue growing 32% YoY, representing a successful transformation from a commoditized CDN into an AI-era edge computing platform [1]. CEO Kip Compton cited AI as 'an increasing tailwind' and Fastly's Compute@Edge platform enables AI inference at the edge — a genuine industry-first capability [2]. Record RPO of $353.8M (+55% YoY) and NRR improvement to 110% demonstrate product-market fit improvement [1]. The edge storage launch expanding into database services materially increases TAM.

inspiration.label: DEVELOPING
inspiration.analysis: CEO Kip Compton has articulated a clear vision around the 'Edge Cloud' as critical internet infrastructure for the AI era, and Fastly's transformation from chronic underperformer to top-performing stock of February 2026 (+60%) reflects strong execution culture [2]. However, Glassdoor's dedicated 'layoff' review section signals significant employee concerns about job security during the transformation [2]. ISS Governance QualityScore of 10 (highest risk) with compensation scores of 10 indicates governance concerns that weigh on organizational trust [2].

infrastructure.label: DEVELOPING
infrastructure.analysis: Fastly guided FY2026 revenue of $700-720M (vs. $624M in 2025), non-GAAP operating profit of $50-60M (doubling the 4% margin of 2025), and free cash flow of $40-50M [1]. The company is approaching profitability after years of losses — Q4 2025 EPS of $0.12 beat estimates of -$0.03 by 500% [1]. Revenue grew 14.78% in 2025, accelerating to 23% in Q4. Institutional ownership at 84% reflects growing confidence.

ai_resilience.label: LOW RISK
ai_resilience.analysis: Fastly is uniquely positioned as an AI enabler: AI content generation is driving exponentially higher CDN traffic volumes, AI inference at the edge requires exactly the low-latency compute Fastly provides, and AI bots are increasing security product demand as enterprises protect against scraping [2]. CEO Compton cited AI as 'an increasing tailwind' for the business [1]. The company's Compute@Edge platform enables AI models to run inference closer to end-users — directly competing for the workloads that matter most in the AI era.

infinite_game.summary: Fastly's three-year transformation under Kip Compton — from a company burning cash and losing customers to record revenue and profitability — demonstrates genuine strategic patience. The positioning of the edge cloud as the delivery mechanism for the agentic AI era reflects a visionary long-term frame. However, the governance concerns, layoff culture, and sub-two-year management team tenure create organizational instability risks.

just_cause.analysis: Fastly's mission of powering a faster, safer, more resilient internet is genuine and validated by its customer base (news media, e-commerce, financial services). The pivot to AI-era edge computing gives this mission renewed strategic relevance [2].

trusting_teams.analysis: Average management tenure of 1.1 years reflects significant leadership turnover [2]. Glassdoor layoff reviews indicate employee anxiety around job security. ISS governance risk score of 10 reflects structural concerns about management-shareholder alignment [2].

worthy_rivals.analysis: Fastly directly benchmarks against Cloudflare (faster growth, stronger brand) and Akamai (legacy CDN leader), with specific architectural differentiation (fewer, more powerful PoPs vs. Akamai's distributed hardware model). Acquisition target thesis by hyperscalers (Google Cloud, Oracle) shows rivals are aware of Fastly's strategic value [2].

existential_flexibility.analysis: The pivot from CDN to AI-era edge computing platform, the launch of edge storage (competing with databases), and the positioning as critical infrastructure for agentic AI all represent profound strategic evolution [2].

courage_to_lead.analysis: CEO Kip Compton's three-year transformation — including the restructuring and talent changes that drove Glassdoor layoff concerns — required organizational courage to pursue [2]. The 2026 guidance of $700-720M well above consensus ($668M) shows conviction [1].

investment_thesis: Fastly's Q4 2025 results marked a genuine business inflection: record revenue of $172.6M (+23% YoY), EPS of $0.12 vs. -$0.03 expected (+500% beat), RPO growing 55% YoY, and NRR improving to 110% — all signals of a healthier, faster-growing business [1]. The 2026 guidance of $700-720M and $50-60M non-GAAP operating profit (doubling margins) was well above consensus [1]. AI serves as an increasing tailwind: more AI-generated content means more CDN traffic, more edge inference demand, and more security against AI bots — all core Fastly products [2].
thesis_continued: Fastly has been a chronic underperformer for five years (down 90% from 2021 highs before recovering) and still trades at ~45x forward earnings with negative trailing GAAP profitability — the valuation requires sustained execution [2]. ISS governance risk score of 10 and management team average tenure of 1.1 years create organizational instability risk [2]. Cloudflare (NET) remains a better-capitalized, faster-growing, and more trusted rival that has consistently outcompeted Fastly for enterprise deals. Customer concentration (top 10 customers = 34% of revenue) creates revenue cliff risk.
key_catalysts: Free cash flow positive in 2026 — management guided $40-50M FCF, which would mark the first sustained FCF positive period in company history [1]
Acquisition by hyperscaler (Google Cloud or Oracle) — Fastly's edge computing platform and customer relationships are cited as acquisition targets in analyst research [2]
Agentic AI traffic growth accelerating edge compute demand — AI agents require low-latency inference delivery that benefits Fastly's Compute@Edge platform
key_risks: Cloudflare competitive pressure — NET has 5x Fastly's market cap, faster revenue growth, and superior edge compute infrastructure, making customer acquisition increasingly expensive
Governance concerns — ISS score of 10 (highest risk) and compensation score of 10 indicate structural alignment issues between management incentives and shareholder returns [2]
Revenue concentration — top 10 customers account for 34% of Q4 2025 revenue; loss of one major customer could materially impair 2026 guidance [1]
sources: Fastly Q4 2025 Record Financial Results and 2026 Guidance, Fastly Investor Relations, February 2026
Fastly CEO Strategy, Culture Analysis and Governance, Computer Weekly / Glassdoor / Simply Wall St, 2026
Fastly Edge Cloud 2026 Resurgence Analysis, FinancialContent / StocksToTrade, February 2026
